description: GlobalWineScore is a wine data service that provides GlobalWineScore ratings and related wine metadata through a web API. Its published developer surface is a REST API for querying score history and latest scores.
summary: GlobalWineScore exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.globalwinescore.com`, described by an OpenAPI spec and authenticated with a per-user API token sent in the `Authorization` header as `Token {YOUR-API-TOKEN}`.
